<div class="fp-main" style="gap:0">
<div style="grid-area:a">
<div class="fp-header">
<div id="fp-file" class="nomobile">[[File:Site Logo.png|250px|link=https://supersnail.wiki.gg/wiki/Super_Snail_Wiki]]</div>
<div id="fp-text">
<div class="fp-text-header nomobile" style="font-family:Comic Sans>'''Welcome to the official ''Super Snail'' Wiki'''</div>

This guide is written and maintained independently by the players of Super Snail. Want to join us? Contact us on the [https://discord.gg/supersnail Discord] tp help out!

Please feel free to contribute by creating new articles or expanding existing ones.<br />
We have {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} [[Special:AllPages|existing pages]] and {{NUMBEROFFILES}} files.
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:b">
<div class="menu-title">About Super Snail</div>
<div style="text-align: center">Super Snail is an idle game with a unique artstyle, complex mechanics, and constant new content. Get ready to embark on an engaging journey in Super Snail and meet tons of fascinating characters along the way. Available on both the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.</div>

</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:c">
<div class="menu-title">Realms</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:maps icon2.png|link=Areas|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Realms]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Koryeo.png|link=Koryeo|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Koryeo]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Yamato.png|link=Yamato|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Yamato]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Cathay.png|link=Cathay|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Cathay]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Murika.png|link=Murika|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Murika]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Rocket Icon.png|link=Rocket|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Rocket]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Britland.png|link=Britland|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Britland]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Kemet.png|link=Kemet|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Kemet]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Hellas.png|link=Hellas|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Hellas]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 20%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Bharata.png|link=Bharata|75px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Bharata]]</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:d">
<div class="menu-title">Basic Gameplay</div>
<div class="menu-button">
<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Hitman.png|link=Hitmen|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Hitmen]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Agamemnon Gear Page.png|link=gear|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Gear]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:home base icon.png|link=Home Base|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Home Base]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:valuables icon.png|link=Relics|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Relics]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Altar icon.png|link=Altar|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Altar]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:partner icon.png|link=Partners|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Partners]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:snail code icon.png|link=Snail codes|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Snail Codes]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Evolution icon.png|link=Evolution|90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Evolution]]</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:e">
<div class="menu-title">Guides</div>
<div class="menu-button">

<div style ="float: right; width: 100%;">

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Incense icon.png|link=Incense|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Incense]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Fugitives Icon.png|link=Fugitives|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Fugitives]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Fissure icon.png|link=Fissure|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Fissure]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Relic Guide Icon.png|link=Relic Guide|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Relic Guide]]</div>
</div>

</div>

<div style ="float: right; width: 100%;">

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Mailbox icon.png|link=Mailbox|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Mailbox]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Museum icon.png|link=Museum|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Museum]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Mirage Icon.png|link=Mirage|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Mirage]]</div>
</div>

<div style ="float: left; width: 25%;">
<span style ="display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px;">[[File:Resonance Icon.png|link=Resonance|90x90px|center]]</span>
<div style="text-align:center;">[[Resonance]]</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:f">
<div class="menu-title">Coming Soon...</div>

</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:g">
<div class="menu-title">Socials</div>
<div class="menu-button plainlinks">
{{Socials|Reddit}}{{Socials|Discord}}{{Socials|Facebook}}{{Socials|Twitter}}{{Socials|YouTube}}
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-menu" style="grid-area:h">
[[File:Intro to key gameplay poster.png|frameless|auto|center|link=Newbie Guide]]
<center>New to the Snailverse? 
Take a look at our [[Newbie Guide|'''<u>Newbie Guide</u>''']]!
</center>
</div>
</div>__NOTOC__ __NOEDITSECTION__ __NOTITLE__
